CustomField.label: State Code
CustomField.description: Two-character USPS state abbreviation (e.g., "UT", "ID") for the primary state where this NEPA action occurs. Matched by NEPA_Permit_Issued_Schedule_Creator against NEPA_State_Risk_Profile__mdt.State_Code__c to retrieve the Field_Inspector_Warning__c for inspection visits.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Two-letter state code (e.g., ID for Idaho). Used to populate state litigation risk context on inspection records at permit issuance.
